title: isodon enanderianus
intro: Isodon enanderianus, also known as Himalayan isodon or Nepalese isodon, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help relieve respiratory issues and reduce pain. The health benefits of Isodon enanderianus include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or dried extract, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
